columns.extraction_plan: Table 1 (page 5) provides X but not Y. Table 2 (page 8) and Figure 3 (page 7) were examined but the value is absent as the document reports 'Time to CRPC' as a secondary efficacy endpoint, providing median times and hazard ratios (HRs) with confidence intervals, not a percentage rate for progression-free survival for the overall treatment arm.
